description.ko: 운송 라인과 네온 불빛이 복잡하고 살아있는 순환계를 형성하는 미래 도시의 압도적인 조감도입니다.
description.en: A sweeping aerial view of a futuristic city where transit lines and neon lights form a complex, living circulatory system.

prompt: A cinematic wide shot of NEON-V, titled 'The Neon Arteries.' An aerial perspective of a sprawling cyberpunk megacity where #1A0033 indigo transit lines flow like veins through the urban sprawl. Thousands of #FF6B35 orange light trails from maglev vehicles create a burning contrast against the #FF00FF magenta and #00FFFF cyan holographic advertisements. A heavy holographic rainstorm creates pixelated ripples on the wet metallic surfaces of skyscrapers. Hyper-detailed tech-noir textures, flickering lens flares, and ray-traced reflections in the flooded streets. 8k resolution, capturing the lonely, vertical scale of a neon-soaked future.
